'''doshawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrillatory|fibrillatory]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrillatory|fibrillatory]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| doshawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:doshawithi|doshawithi]] || [[word:doshawiji|doshawiji]] || [[word:doshawishi|doshawishi]] || [[word:doshawiki|doshawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:doshawuthuthu|doshawuthuthu]] || [[word:doshawujuju|doshawujuju]] || [[word:doshawushushu|doshawushushu]] || [[word:doshawukuku|doshawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:doshawuthu|doshawuthu]] || [[word:doshawuju|doshawuju]] || [[word:doshawushu|doshawushu]] || [[word:doshawuku|doshawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:doshawufthuf|doshawufthuf]] || [[word:doshawufjuf|doshawufjuf]] || [[word:doshawufshuf|doshawufshuf]] || [[word:doshawufkuf|doshawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:doshawethe|doshawethe]] || [[word:doshaweje|doshaweje]] || [[word:doshaweshe|doshaweshe]] || [[word:doshaweke|doshaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:doshawothotho|doshawothotho]] || [[word:doshawojojo|doshawojojo]] || [[word:doshawoshosho|doshawoshosho]] || [[word:doshawokoko|doshawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:doshawotho|doshawotho]] || [[word:doshawojo|doshawojo]] || [[word:doshawosho|doshawosho]] || [[word:doshawoko|doshawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:doshawofthof|doshawofthof]] || [[word:doshawofjof|doshawofjof]] || [[word:doshawofshof|doshawofshof]] || [[word:doshawofkof|doshawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:doshawïfthïf|doshawïfthïf]] || [[word:doshawïfjïf|doshawïfjïf]] || [[word:doshawïfshïf|doshawïfshïf]] || [[word:doshawïfkïf|doshawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:doshawïfthïfthïf|doshawïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:doshawïfjïfjïf|doshawïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:doshawïfshïfshïf|doshawïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:doshawïfkïfkïf|doshawïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:doshawïfthïf|doshawïfthïf]] || [[word:doshawïfjïf|doshawïfjïf]] || [[word:doshawïfshïf|doshawïfshïf]] || [[word:doshawïfkïf|doshawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:doshawïfthïf|doshawïfthïf]] || [[word:doshawïfjïf|doshawïfjïf]] || [[word:doshawïfshïf|doshawïfshïf]] || [[word:doshawïfkïf|doshawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:doshawæthæ|doshawæthæ]] || [[word:doshawæjæ|doshawæjæ]] || [[word:doshawæshæ|doshawæshæ]] || [[word:doshawækæ|doshawækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:doshawathatha|doshawathatha]] || [[word:doshawajaja|doshawajaja]] || [[word:doshawashasha|doshawashasha]] || [[word:doshawakaka|doshawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:doshawatha|doshawatha]] || [[word:doshawaja|doshawaja]] || [[word:doshawasha|doshawasha]] || [[word:doshawaka|doshawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:doshawafthaf|doshawafthaf]] || [[word:doshawafjaf|doshawafjaf]] || [[word:doshawafshaf|doshawafshaf]] || [[word:doshawafkaf|doshawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:doshawasha|doshawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:doshawshësha|doshawshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doshawrosha|doshawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doshawmusha|doshawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:doshawyasha|doshawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoshawnkshësha|godoshawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoshawnkrosha|godoshawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoshawnkmusha|godoshawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoshawnkyasha|godoshawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:doshashawasha|doshashawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:doshashawshësha|doshashawshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doshashawrosha|doshashawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doshashawmusha|doshashawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:doshashawyasha|doshashawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoshashawnkshësha|godoshashawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoshashawnkrosha|godoshashawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoshashawnkmusha|godoshashawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoshashawnkyasha|godoshashawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:deshæwasha|deshæwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:deshæwshësha|deshæwshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:deshæwrosha|deshæwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:deshæwmusha|deshæwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:deshæwyasha|deshæwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godeshæwnkshësha|godeshæwnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godeshæwnkrosha|godeshæwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godeshæwnkmusha|godeshæwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godeshæwnkyasha|godeshæwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:doshfawasha|doshfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:doshfawshësha|doshfawshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doshfawrosha|doshfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doshfawmusha|doshfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:doshfawyasha|doshfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoshfawnkshësha|godoshfawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoshfawnkrosha|godoshfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoshfawnkmusha|godoshfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoshfawnkyasha|godoshfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
